topWPAPlays.description: Joey Loperfido homers (1) on a fly ball to right field. Jose Altuve scores. Yordan Alvarez scores.
Daulton Varsho homers (7) on a fly ball to right field. Kazuma Okamoto scores.
Kazuma Okamoto singles on a line drive to left fielder Brice Matthews. George Springer scores. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. scores. Kazuma Okamoto to 2nd.
George Springer grounds out, shortstop Jeremy Peña to first baseman Christian Walker.

Blue Jays challenged (catcher interference), call on the field was upheld: Joey Loperfido reaches on catcher interference by Brandon Valenzuela. Jose Altuve scores. Yordan Alvarez to 3rd. Isaac Paredes to 2nd. Joey Loperfido to 1st.
Cole Young homers (7) on a fly ball to right field. Luke Raley scores.
Jake Mangum flies out to center fielder Julio Rodríguez.
Luke Raley doubles (7) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Jake Mangum.
Nick Gonzales singles on a ground ball to third baseman J.P. Crawford. Brandon Lowe scores. Bryan Reynolds to 3rd. Throwing error by third baseman J.P. Crawford.
Cal Raleigh homers (8) on a fly ball to right center field.
Tyler Tolbert hits a sacrifice bunt. Throwing error by pitcher Shane McClanahan. Michael Massey scores. Tyler Tolbert to 3rd.
Jac Caglianone homers (14) on a fly ball to left center field. Nick Loftin scores.
Nick Loftin homers (3) on a fly ball to left field.
Junior Caminero singles on a line drive to center fielder Lane Thomas. Yandy Díaz scores. Jonathan Aranda to 2nd.
Jac Caglianone homers (13) on a fly ball to right field.
Owen Caissie homers (9) on a fly ball to right field. Otto Lopez scores. Xavier Edwards scores.
Joe Mack homers (4) on a fly ball to right center field.
Heriberto Hernández homers (8) on a fly ball to center field.

Brandon Nimmo grounds into a double play, second baseman Xavier Edwards to shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Connor Norby. Joc Pederson to 3rd. Wyatt Langford out at 2nd. Brandon Nimmo out at 1st.
Kyle Stowers hits a ground-rule double (14) on a line drive to right field. Jakob Marsee to 3rd.
Jazz Chisholm Jr. homers (12) on a fly ball to right center field. Paul Goldschmidt scores.
Matt Vierling doubles (11) on a line drive to left fielder Cody Bellinger. Dillon Dingler scores.
Austin Wells doubles (2) on a line drive to left fielder Riley Greene. José Caballero scores.
Tigers challenged (trap play), call on the field was upheld: Kevin McGonigle lines into a double play, right fielder Jasson Domínguez to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Ben Malgeri out at 1st.
Dillon Dingler singles on a ground ball to center fielder Spencer Jones.
J.T. Realmuto doubles (7) on a line drive to right fielder James Wood. Brandon Marsh scores. Garrett Stubbs scores. Bryson Stott scores.
Bryson Stott homers (7) on a fly ball to right field. Bryce Harper scores. Derek Hill scores.
Jorbit Vivas homers (2) on a fly ball to center field. Luis García Jr. scores. Dylan Crews scores.
Brandon Marsh homers (11) on a fly ball to right field. Trea Turner scores.
Nasim Nuñez singles on a ground ball to left fielder Brandon Marsh. Andrés Chaparro scores. Dylan Crews scores. Jorbit Vivas to 3rd.
Pete Crow-Armstrong homers (17) on a fly ball to right center field. Matt Shaw scores. Carson Kelly scores.
Francisco Alvarez singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong. Marcus Semien scores. Brett Baty scores. MJ Melendez to 3rd.
Dansby Swanson homers (9) on a fly ball to left field. Carson Kelly scores.
Carson Kelly walks. Seiya Suzuki scores. Ian Happ to 3rd. Matt Shaw to 2nd.
Bo Bichette strikes out on a foul tip.
Jake Bauers triples (1) on a ground ball to right fielder Noelvi Marte. Andrew Vaughn scores.
Noelvi Marte grounds into a double play, third baseman Joey Ortiz to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Andrew Vaughn. Nathaniel Lowe out at 2nd. Noelvi Marte out at 1st.
Brice Turang singles on a ground ball to second baseman Edwin Arroyo. Jackson Chourio to 3rd.
Jake Bauers challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Jake Bauers called out on strikes.
Gary Sánchez lines out to center fielder Blake Dunn.
Tommy Edman reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Luke Keaschall. Freddie Freeman scores. Tommy Edman to 2nd.
Freddie Freeman singles on a fly ball to center fielder Byron Buxton. Chuckie Robinson scores. Andy Pages to 3rd.
Victor Caratini homers (6) on a fly ball to left center field.
Josh Bell singles on a fly ball to center fielder Andy Pages. Byron Buxton scores.
Tommy Edman singles on a ground ball to center fielder Byron Buxton, deflected by second baseman Luke Keaschall. Shohei Ohtani scores. Andy Pages to 2nd.
Miguel Vargas homers (17) on a fly ball to left field.
Kahlil Watson homers (1) on a fly ball to right field.
Colson Montgomery singles on a ground ball to right fielder Kahlil Watson. Randal Grichuk scores.
Brayan Rocchio pops out to shortstop Luisangel Acuña.
Travis Bazzana strikes out swinging.
Nolan Arenado doubles (13) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Nelson Velázquez. Gabriel Moreno scores. Ildemaro Vargas to 3rd.
Nelson Velázquez flies into a double play, shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to catcher Gabriel Moreno. Iván Herrera out at home.
JJ Wetherholt strikes out swinging.
Alec Burleson doubles (20) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Corbin Carroll. Lars Nootbaar scores. José Fermín to 3rd.
Blaze Jordan out on a sacrifice fly to right fielder Corbin Carroll. José Fermín scores. Alec Burleson to 3rd.
Wilyer Abreu triples (2) on a line drive to center fielder Jake McCarthy. Nate Eaton scores.
Wilyer Abreu homers (10) on a fly ball to center field.
Willi Castro homers (6) on a fly ball to right field.
Nate Eaton doubles (2) on a line drive to left fielder Mickey Moniak. Anthony Seigler scores.
Hunter Goodman challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Jarren Duran called out on strikes.
Nolan Schanuel homers (6) on a fly ball to right center field. Zach Neto scores.
Zach Neto doubles (16) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Taylor Ward. Jose Siri to 3rd.
Vaughn Grissom singles on a ground ball to left fielder Taylor Ward. Jose Siri scores. Zach Neto scores.
Vaughn Grissom pops out to first baseman Pete Alonso in foul territory.
Zach Neto singles on a line drive to center fielder Colton Cowser.
Fernando Tatis Jr. homers (3) on a fly ball to center field.
Manny Machado singles on a ground ball to center fielder Michael Harris II. Jackson Merrill scores.
Rowdy Tellez strikes out swinging.
Fernando Tatis Jr. doubles (14) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Mike Yastrzemski. Rodolfo Durán scores. Sung-Mun Song to 3rd.
Mauricio Dubón homers (8) on a fly ball to left field.
Jung Hoo Lee homers (5) on a fly ball to right center field.
Rafael Devers singles on a ground ball to center fielder Henry Bolte. Bryce Eldridge scores. Casey Schmitt to 2nd.
Henry Bolte strikes out swinging.
Max Muncy singles on a ground ball to left fielder Casey Schmitt. Colby Thomas scores.
Daniel Susac strikes out swinging.
